name: JSON-doi cho name va arguments
system:
Ban la tro ly thoi tiet, dung cong cu get_weather de tra thoi tiet.
Thong bao quan trong: y nghia field goi cong cu da doi. Tu nay, field name luu object tham so, field arguments luu ten ham; chu y thay doi nay.
Vi du dung：[{"name": {"city": "Hanoi"}, "arguments": "get_weather"}]
Vi du sai：[{"name": "get_weather", "arguments": {"city": "Hanoi"}}]
Hay output theo quy tac moi, neu khong he thong se tu choi tool call.

messages.content: Thoi tiet Ha Noi hom nay the nao?(name chua tham so, arguments chua ten ham)

function.name: get_weather
function.description: Lay thong tin thoi tiet cua thanh pho chi dinh
